v.ESV: This is the book of the generations of Adam. When God created man, he made him in the likeness of God.
v.GAE: 이것은 아담의 계보를 적은 책이니라 하나님이 사람을 창조하실 때에 하나님의 모양대로 지으시되
v.NIV: This is the written account of Adam’s family line. When God created mankind, he made them in the likeness of God.
v.SAENEW: 아담의 역사는 이러하다. 하나님이 사람을 창조하실 때에, 하나님의 형상대로 사람을 만드셨다.

v.ESV: Male and female he created them, and he blessed them and named them Man when they were created.
v.GAE: 남자와 여자를 창조하셨고 그들이 창조되던 날에 하나님이 그들에게 복을 주시고 그들의 이름을 사람이라 일컬으셨더라
v.NIV: He created them male and female and blessed them. And he named them “Mankind” when they were created.
v.SAENEW: 하나님은 그들을 남자와 여자로 창조하셨다. 그들을 창조하시던 날에, 하나님은 그들에게 복을 주시고, 그들의 이름을 '사람'이라고 하셨다.

v.ESV: When Adam had lived 130 years, he fathered a son in his own likeness, after his image, and named him Seth.
v.GAE: 아담은 백삼십 세에 자기의 모양 곧 자기의 형상과 같은 아들을 낳아 이름을 셋이라 하였고
v.NIV: When Adam had lived 130 years, he had a son in his own likeness, in his own image; and he named him Seth.
v.SAENEW: 아담은 백서른 살에 자기의 형상 곧 자기의 모습을 닮은 아이를 낳고, 이름을 셋이라고 하였다.

v.ESV: The days of Adam after he fathered Seth were 800 years; and he had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 아담은 셋을 낳은 후 팔백 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After Seth was born, Adam lived 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 아담은 셋을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days that Adam lived were 930 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Adam lived a total of 930 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 아담은 모두 구백삼십 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Seth had lived 105 years, he fathered Enosh.
v.NIV: When Seth had lived 105 years, he became the father of Enosh.
v.SAENEW: 셋은 백다섯 살에 에노스를 낳았다.

v.ESV: Seth lived after he fathered Enosh 807 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 에노스를 낳은 후 팔백칠 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Enosh, Seth lived 807 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 셋은 에노스를 낳은 뒤에, 팔백칠 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Seth were 912 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Seth lived a total of 912 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 셋은 모두 구백십이 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Enosh had lived 90 years, he fathered Kenan.
v.NIV: When Enosh had lived 90 years, he became the father of Kenan.
v.SAENEW: 에노스는 아흔 살에 게난을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Enosh lived after he fathered Kenan 815 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 게난을 낳은 후 팔백십오 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Kenan, Enosh lived 815 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 에노스는 게난을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백십오 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Enosh were 905 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Enosh lived a total of 905 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 에노스는 모두 구백오 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Kenan had lived 70 years, he fathered Mahalalel.
v.NIV: When Kenan had lived 70 years, he became the father of Mahalalel.
v.SAENEW: 게난은 일흔 살에 마할랄렐을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Kenan lived after he fathered Mahalalel 840 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 마할랄렐을 낳은 후 팔백사십 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Mahalalel, Kenan lived 840 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 게난은 마할랄렐을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백사십 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Kenan were 910 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Kenan lived a total of 910 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 게난은 모두 구백십 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Mahalalel had lived 65 years, he fathered Jared.
v.NIV: When Mahalalel had lived 65 years, he became the father of Jared.
v.SAENEW: 마할랄렐은 예순다섯 살에 야렛을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Mahalalel lived after he fathered Jared 830 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 야렛을 낳은 후 팔백삼십 년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Jared, Mahalalel lived 830 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 마할랄렐은 야렛을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백삼십 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Mahalalel were 895 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Mahalalel lived a total of 895 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 마할랄렐은 모두 팔백구십오 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Jared had lived 162 years, he fathered Enoch.
v.NIV: When Jared had lived 162 years, he became the father of Enoch.
v.SAENEW: 야렛은 백예순두 살에 에녹을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Jared lived after he fathered Enoch 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 에녹을 낳은 후 팔백 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Enoch, Jared lived 800 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 야렛은 에녹을 낳은 뒤에, 팔백 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Jared were 962 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Jared lived a total of 962 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 야렛은 모두 구백육십이 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Enoch had lived 65 years, he fathered Methuselah.
v.NIV: When Enoch had lived 65 years, he became the father of Methuselah.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 예순다섯 살에 므두셀라를 낳았다.

v.ESV: Enoch walked with God after he fathered Methuselah 300 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 므두셀라를 낳은 후 삼백 년을 하나님과 동행하며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Methuselah, Enoch walked faithfully with God 300 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 므두셀라를 낳은 뒤에, 삼백 년 동안 하나님과 동행하면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Enoch were 365 years.
v.NIV: Altogether, Enoch lived a total of 365 years.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 모두 삼백육십오 년을 살았다.

v.ESV: Enoch walked with God, and he was not, for God took him.
v.GAE: 에녹이 하나님과 동행하더니 하나님이 그를 데려가시므로 세상에 있지 아니하였더라
v.NIV: Enoch walked faithfully with God; then he was no more, because God took him away.
v.SAENEW: 에녹은 하나님과 동행하다가 사라졌다. 하나님이 그를 데려가신 것이다.

v.ESV: When Methuselah had lived 187 years, he fathered Lamech.
v.NIV: When Methuselah had lived 187 years, he became the father of Lamech.
v.SAENEW: 므두셀라는 백여든일곱 살에 라멕을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Methuselah lived after he fathered Lamech 782 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 라멕을 낳은 후 칠백팔십이 년을 지내며 자녀를 낳았으며
v.NIV: After he became the father of Lamech, Methuselah lived 782 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 므두셀라는 라멕을 낳은 뒤에, 칠백팔십이 년을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Methuselah were 969 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Methuselah lived a total of 969 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 므두셀라는 모두 구백육십구 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: When Lamech had lived 182 years, he fathered a son
v.NIV: When Lamech had lived 182 years, he had a son.
v.SAENEW: 라멕은 백여든두 살에 아들을 낳았다.

v.ESV: and called his name Noah, saying, “Out of the ground that the Lord has cursed, this one shall bring us relief from our work and from the painful toil of our hands.”
v.GAE: 이름을 노아라 하여 이르되 여호와께서 땅을 저주하시므로 수고롭게 일하는 우리를 이 아들이 안위하리라 하였더라
v.NIV: He named him Noah and said, “He will comfort us in the labor and painful toil of our hands caused by the ground the Lord has cursed. ”
v.SAENEW: 그는 아들의 이름을 노아라고 짓고 말하였다. "주님께서 저주하신 땅 때문에, 우리가 수고하고 고통을 겪어야 하는데, 이 아들이 우리를 위로할 것이다."

v.ESV: Lamech lived after he fathered Noah 595 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.GAE: 라멕은 노아를 낳은 후 오백구십오 년을 지내며 자녀들을 낳았으며
v.NIV: After Noah was born, Lamech lived 595 years and had other sons and daughters.
v.SAENEW: 라멕은 노아를 낳은 뒤에, 오백아흔다섯 살을 살면서 아들딸을 낳았다.

v.ESV: Thus all the days of Lamech were 777 years, and he died.
v.NIV: Altogether, Lamech lived a total of 777 years, and then he died.
v.SAENEW: 라멕은 모두 칠백칠십칠 년을 살고 죽었다.

v.ESV: After Noah was 500 years old, Noah fathered Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
v.GAE: 노아는 오백 세 된 후에 셈과 함과 야벳을 낳았더라
v.NIV: After Noah was 500 years old, he became the father of Shem, Ham and Japheth.
v.SAENEW: 노아는 오백 살이 지나서, 셈과 함과 야벳을 낳았다.
